name: HEALTHY EXTRACTS INC.
summary: Healthy Extracts Inc. (HYEX) is a platform for acquiring, developing, patenting, marketing, and distributing plant-based nutraceuticals. Operating through two subsidiaries, BergaMet NA LLC and Ultimate Brain Nutrients LLC, the company offers heart, immune, and brain health supplements. Key products include BergaMet PRO+ (citrus bergamot-based) and UBN brain health formulations. The company targets U.S. consumers and operates in the multibillion-dollar nutraceuticals market.
